titles.title: Beulah Land, I'm Longing for You

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: I'm kind of homesick for a country, to which I've never been before No sad goodbyes will there be spoken and time won't matter anymore

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Beulah Land I'm longing for you, and someday on thee I'll stand There my home shall be eternal. In Beulah Land, Sweet Beulah land

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: I'm looking now across that river, to where my faiths'gonna end in sight There's just a few more days to labor, then I will take my heavenly flight
